intro: Pinus pseudopumilio, also known as the "Aceri Fagi", is a species of pine tree native to the Balkan Peninsula. The resin of Pinus pseudopumilio has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues, wound healing, and digestive problems.
